rationale: Educ. Code §29.0041 governs parental consent for psychological examinations in special education evaluations. It has no nexus to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 29.0041. INFORMATION AND CONSENT FOR CERTAIN PSYCHOLOGICAL EXAMINATIONS OR TESTS.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
